case_title: ANTHONY JAMES BRAXTON VS. SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,775.69 FILED BY BRAXTON, ANTHONY JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-21-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. "PLAINTIFF'S GOVERNMENT CLAIM AGAINST THE DEFENDANT WAS NOT TIMELY. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE, AS AN IMPROPER PARTY", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT WAS REPRESENTED BY CAROL ROBINSON--CLAIMS ADJUSTER. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SF. WAS REPRESENTED BY GRACE M. GLENN--CLAIMS ADJUSTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED MAY-11-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAY-21-2015 AT 1:30 PM.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED MAY-11-2005, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT
